strengths: Hands-on distributed systems and high-throughput microservices background (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency async I/O)
Active involvement in agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, demonstrating early-mover familiarity with agentic workflows
Polyglot, full-stack practitioner with a long track record of shipping production systems across varied domains and environments
concerns: No executive or people-leadership history — the resume shows no evidence of managing or scaling engineering teams, let alone growing an org from 10 to 30+ with a senior leadership layer
Fintech infrastructure depth is thin — RIDE Capital involvement is brief and not described in terms of credit systems, payment flows, or regulatory compliance
Agentic AI experience appears limited to developer tooling and MCP framework contributions, not production multi-agent systems operating under real financial or regulatory consequences
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically capable and broadly experienced staff-level engineer with genuine distributed systems credentials and early exposure to agentic AI tooling, but this role requires an executive who has already built and led large engineering organizations, operated AI systems with direct financial consequences in regulated environments, and owned fintech infrastructure at depth — none of which are evidenced in the resume. The gap between his current seniority and the scope of this CTO position is substantial.
